_comment: Build-side supplement for sponsor data that isn't (yet) in the Google Sheet. 'fills' only writes a field when the sheet cell is BLANK, so the sheet always wins once populated. 'additions' add sponsors that have track-record deals but no Sponsor Connection row. Keys use the generator's field names (name, preferred, founded, aum, description, advantages[], website, hq, logo). Remove an entry once the same data lives in the sheet.

additions.name: Blue Door
additions.description: Blue Door Asset Management I is a self-storage DST sponsor and a subsidiary of Strategic Storage Growth Trust III, an entity sponsored by an affiliate of SmartStop Self Storage REIT (NYSE: SMA). It packages SmartStop-operated self-storage facilities into Delaware Statutory Trusts for 1031-exchange investors, in both all-cash and leveraged structures. Across its trusts, Blue Door holds roughly 5,420 storage units and about 697,400 net rentable square feet, backed by SmartStop's national self-storage operating and management platform.
advantages: Self-storage specialist backed by SmartStop's national operating and management platform (NYSE: SMA).
Offers both all-cash (no-mortgage) and leveraged DST structures.
Institutional sponsor lineage through Strategic Storage Growth Trust III and SmartStop.
